calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-06-2005 Continued To Jan-10-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-10-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Susan Parkinson, Esq. for Plaintiff: Robert Tanuwijaya.
No appearance by the Defendant: Nicole Bertrand.
Plaintiff's witness: Robert Tanuwijaya, was sworn and direct examined.
Exh. 1 - Rental Agreement dtd. 7-19-04----------ID/EVID.
Exh. 2 - Threeday Notice and Proof of Service---ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Nicole Bertrand as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1010 Bush St., #224, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $1,275.60
No Attorney's Fees.
Waived Costs
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-10-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: SUSAN PARKINSON FOR ROBERT TANUWIJAYA
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT NICOLE BERTRAND

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL
